changes: 🤝 New Affiliate Program signup flow — apply, create your account, and track your application status from a new Affiliate Dashboard; admins get notified by email when approved
💡 Hover tooltips added across the dashboard (all business types) — point your cursor over sidebar items and buttons (Add Staff, Add POS, Reset Device, etc.) for a quick explanation of what they do
☕ Coffee Shop: Hover tooltips added — point your cursor over sidebar items and buttons (e.g. Add Staff, Inventory) for a quick explanation of what they do
☕ Coffee Shop: Raw Materials category — fixed item-name examples (e.g. Powder → Milk Powder, Cinnamon Powder)
☕ Coffee Shop: "Beverages" raw-material category auto-renamed to "Syrups" (Beverages is for menu products, not raw materials; avoids overlap with existing "Powder" category)
🔧 Fixed: new POS device sometimes bounced back to "Enter Store Code" right after connecting (device registration wasn't finished before reload)
🖼️ Fixed: product photos uploaded from the dashboard weren't showing on the POS menu grid
🔤 Fixed garbled currency symbols/emojis (₱ and icons showing as strange characters) across all POS screens
💬 Messages inbox — owner can message staff; staff see unread badge
🧾 Activity Log — receipt shows as button (View/Accept/Invalid)
✉️ Invalid receipt → auto-sends message to staff to resubmit
💰 Cash remittance popup when cashier logs out
📋 Manager receives & confirms remittance with description
🔴 COH panel — confirmed cashiers show ₱0, pending shows amount
📦 Add stock — shows cost price, deduct/deposit COH, receipt upload
🤖 AI detection 2.5x faster — single inference, 800ms loop
